title: Complete checkout as a signed-in customer
description: This verifies an authenticated shopper can move from cart to checkout, place an order, and see a confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /shop/products
Click add to cart on a product card
Open the cart page
Proceed to checkout
Fill in the shipping details
Fill in the payment details
Submit the order
Verify an order confirmation is visible
Verify the completed order is acknowledged

title: Complete checkout from cart to confirmation
description: This test verifies that an authenticated shopper can move from the cart to checkout, enter shipping and payment details, submit the order, and see an order confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the cart review link
Proceed to checkout
Fill in the shipping name field with Jordan Rivera
Fill in the shipping address field with 123 Main Street
Fill in the shipping city field with Austin
Fill in the shipping postal code field with 78701
Fill in the payment details field with a valid card number and billing information
Submit the order
Verify an order confirmation is visible

title: Add a product to the cart from the listing page
description: This verifies a shopper can add a product from the listing page and see it reflected in the cart.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop/products
Click add to cart on a product card
Open the cart page
Verify the added item is shown in the cart
Verify a cart subtotal is displayed

title: Submit checkout with valid shipping details
description: This test verifies that an authenticated shopper can complete checkout after entering valid shipping information and payment details.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the cart review link
Proceed to checkout
Fill in the shipping name field with Jordan Rivera
Fill in the shipping address field with 123 Main Street
Fill in the shipping city field with Austin
Fill in the shipping postal code field with 78701
Fill in the payment details field with a valid card number and billing information
Submit the order
Verify the order is completed successfully

title: Browse featured products from the homepage
description: This verifies a guest shopper can start on the homepage and reach a browsable product listing with featured products available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view the product listing
Verify products are displayed
Verify product filtering controls are available

title: Review cart contents after navigating from products
description: This verifies a shopper can open the cart after adding items and review the selected products before checkout.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop/products
Click add to cart on a product card
Open the cart page
Verify cart items are displayed
Verify the subtotal reflects the cart contents

title: Filter products by category from the homepage
description: This verifies a guest shopper can use a homepage category card to see products narrowed to that category.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a category card
Verify products are displayed
Verify the product list is narrowed to a category

title: Update cart quantity and see the subtotal recalculate
description: This verifies a shopper can increase or decrease cart quantity and see the subtotal update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop/products
Click add to cart on a product card
Open the cart page
Increase the item quantity
Verify the cart quantity changes
Verify the subtotal updates

title: Log in with valid credentials
description: This verifies a registered customer can sign in and begin an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user is signed in
Verify authenticated account access is available

title: Search and price filter products on the listing page
description: This verifies a shopper can refine the product list on the product page using search and price controls and see the results update.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop/products
Fill in the search field with a product name
Adjust the price filter to a valid range
Verify the product list updates to match the filters
Verify filtered products are displayed

title: Show checkout fields for a signed-in shopper
description: This test verifies that an authenticated shopper can open checkout from the cart and see the shipping and payment entry form.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the cart review link
Proceed to checkout
Verify the shipping details form is visible
Verify the payment information form is visible

title: Register a new account
description: This verifies a guest can complete the registration form and see that the account was created.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/register
Fill in the name field with a new user name
Fill in the email field with a new email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify an account created confirmation is visible

title: Keep checkout accessible after signing in
description: This test verifies that a shopper who signs in can reach checkout from the cart without being blocked and can see the active session state.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the cart review link
Proceed to checkout
Verify the authenticated checkout page is visible
Verify the user session is active

title: Remove an item from the cart
description: This verifies a shopper can remove a cart item and the cart updates to reflect the removal.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop/products
Click add to cart on a product card
Open the cart page
Remove the item from the cart
Verify the item is removed from the cart
Verify the cart subtotal is updated

title: See an empty cart state
description: This verifies a shopper opening an empty cart sees an empty state instead of cart items.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop/cart
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no cart items are displayed

title: Show an empty result when filters remove all products
description: This verifies a shopper sees an empty state when search or price filters eliminate all matching products.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop/products
Fill in the search field with a unique non-matching value
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no products are displayed

title: Block checkout for guests
description: This verifies an unauthenticated shopper cannot access checkout and is redirected to sign in or prompted to authenticate.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop/checkout
Verify access to checkout is blocked
Verify a sign-in prompt or redirect is shown

title: Require authentication before checkout access
description: This test verifies that an unauthenticated shopper is redirected away from checkout and prompted to log in instead of reaching the checkout form.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop/checkout
Verify a login prompt or sign-in screen is visible
Verify the checkout form is not visible

title: Show login validation feedback for invalid input
description: This verifies the login form shows validation feedback when the user enters invalid credentials format.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with an invalid email format
Fill in the password field with a short password
Submit the login form
Verify login validation feedback is visible
Verify the form is not submitted
